violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Establishment is to clean walk in cooler ceiling. Establishment is to protect all food product from contamination while cleaning. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The outside dumpster area was observed not maintained. The outside dumpster refuse area must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The ceiling tiles in the sales area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
